series_metadata.series_description: Contains master copies of all AIDS Unit Surveys. The surveys are used to gather confidential medical and demographic information on individuals infected with the AIDS virus and prevalence of the virus in the State of Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: destruction of hard copy ; Microform: 50 years ; Paper: 1 year
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
